Query.tables: AE W C CPR P CO AD CCBC
Query.SQL: SELECT /*+ ORDERED*/ C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'CASE' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.DEFENDANT1", ( SELECT PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = 2 AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'DEFENDANT' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID ) AS "C.DEFENDANT2", NULL AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM CASES C, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, CCBC_REF_CODES CCBC WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = 1 AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'DEFENDANT' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CCBC.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE' AND CCBC.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND CCBC.RV_HIGH_VALUE != 'INSOLVENCY' UNION SELECT AE.AE_NUMBER || 'AE' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", AE.AE_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'AE' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.DEFENDANT1", NULL AS "C.DEFENDANT2", NULL AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", AE.ISSUING_CRT_CODE AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE, CASES C, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P WHERE AE.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND C.CASE_NUMBER = AE.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = AE.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = AE.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AE.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT W.WARRANT_ID AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", W.WARRANT_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'HOME WARRANT' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", W.DEFENDANT1 AS "C.DEFENDANT1", W.DEFENDANT2 AS "C.DEFENDANT2", W.ISSUED_BY AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", W.EXECUTED_BY AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NULL UNION SELECT W.WARRANT_ID AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", W.DEFENDANT1 AS "C.DEFENDANT1", W.DEFENDANT2 AS "C.DEFENDANT2", W.ISSUED_BY AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", W.EXECUTED_BY AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", CO.CO_NUMBER AS "C.DISPLAY_NUMBER", 'CO' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "C.DEFENDANT1", NULL AS "C.DEFENDANT2", NULL AS "C.ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.EXECUTING_COURT", CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "C.OWNING_COURT" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO, ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CO.CO_NUMBER = AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER

Query.tables: AE W C CO WR RC
Query.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM CASES C WHERE ${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'CASE' AND C.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND (C.STATUS = 'PAID' OR C.STATUS = 'TRANSFERRED' OR C.STATUS = 'SETTLED/WDRN') UNION SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AE, CASES C WHERE ${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'AE' AND AE.AE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND C.CASE_NUMBER = AE.CASE_NUMBER AND (C.STATUS = 'PAID' OR C.STATUS = 'TRANSFERRED' OR C.STATUS = 'SETTLED/WDRN') UNION SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE (${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'HOME WARRANT' OR ${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'FOREIGN WARRANT') AND WR.WARRANT_ID = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' UNION SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*), 0, 'Y', 'N') AS "C.OUTSTANDING" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE ${C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE} = 'CO' AND CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND (CO.CO_STATUS IS NULL OR (CO.CO_STATUS != 'LIVE' AND CO.CO_STATUS != 'DEBTR PAYNG'))
